profile.description:
Hi there! 
I'm Titouan, a dedicated fullstack developer with over 3 years of experience, trained at {university}. 
Due to this background, I have a user-centered design approach and understand the importance of a good user experience. 

In my past experiences, I have also gained a lot of technical expertise with various tools and methodologies. I'm able to take technical subjects in hand and quickly gain skill to focus on the core of the design, with no compromise on technical quality and clean code. 

After 2 years working in Italy, I am now moving back to France and looking for exciting new opportunities for me to apply my skills and grow as a developer.

contact.title: Let's get in touch
contact.description: Feel free to reach out for collaborations or just to say hi!

exportView.profileDescription: Full-stack developer with more than 3 years of experience, trained at {university}. I combine a user-centered design mindset with strong technical ownership, from architecture to delivery. In previous roles, I developed expertise across modern tools and methodologies, with a strong focus on clean code, performance, and maintainable solutions. After two years in Italy, I am now based in France and looking for new opportunities to contribute and continue growing as a developer.
